CNV Networking: VM networking stack: bridge, SR-IOV, OVN, DPDK, secondary NICs, IP allocation, network policies
CNV Virt: Core virtualization: libvirt, QEMU/KVM, VM lifecycle, live migration, hotplug, instance types
CNV Storage: VM storage: PVCs, DataVolumes, CDI, disk operations, snapshots, cloning, storage profiles
CNV Console: Web UI: OpenShift Console plugin for managing VMs, templates, instance types, dashboards
CNV SSP: Scheduling, Scale, Performance operator: node placement, CPU topology, NUMA, tuning policies
CNV HCO: HyperConverged Operator: top-level operator that manages all CNV sub-operators and their CRDs
CNV CDI: Containerized Data Importer: importing VM disk images from URLs, registries, or PVCs
CNV MTQ: Managed Tenant Quota: resource quota management across namespaces for VMs
CNV AAQ: Application Aware Quota: application-level resource management for virtual machines
CNV Tests: E2E test framework, CI infrastructure, test utilities, Polarion integration
CNV Docs: Documentation: product docs, release notes, API references, guides
